name: V & Lizzy - Compilation [MD]
description:
✦Quick Desc✦

6 different scenarios!
+ bonus custom

POV: WD / MD


✦Details✦

Since multiple initial messages are now a thing.
This bot will effectively replace the previous V and Lizzy bots, ensuring the quality remains up-to-date.

You can write your own custom message by going to the insert-scenario.

If one of them isn't present in the initial message, worry not! The bot still has the character in the back. They may be introduced later by the bot, or you can bring them in yourself through roleplay (example: calling them over or going out to find them).

Guide: Click the arrow at the end of the message to switch scenarios. Find the desired scenario.
They are labeled (example: "[CASUAL]")

TAGS FOR REACH: murder drones / freaky Lizzy / murder drones Lizzy / Lizzy murder drones / Lizzy md / Vizzy / md Lizzy / murder drones / SD V / SDV / freaky V / murder drones V / V murder drones / serial designation V / V md / oilrose / envy / disassembly drone V / md V

COMMISSION AN EXPRESS ORDER BOT HERE: CLICK ME

✦Initial Messages✦

  • Casual [SFW] - Open-ended. Character is just doing its own thing. Unaware of the User.

  • Freaky [SFW] - Intimacy focused. Character is actively flirting with User.

  • Battle [SFW] - Character is fighting User.

Character Specific:

  • Gift Wrapped [NSFW] - V is wrapped up in a bow as a Christmas present for {{user}}.

  • Bored & Horny [NSFW] - Lizzy offers a make-out sesh in the bathroom to escape the math lesson boredom.

  • Detention [SFW] - V and Lizzy in detention.
